/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ImGuiApp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiApp.dir/MovieDB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiApp.dir/ImGui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiApp.dir/ImGui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiApp.dir/ImGui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiApp.dir/ImGui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiApp.dir/ImGui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiApp.dir/ImGui/ImGuiFileDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiApp.dir/ImGui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImGuiApp.dir/ImGui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o ImGuiApp  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -lcurl -lpthread -ldl -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreFoundation
